# Parts List (Board Only)

If you already have a **Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32-S3 Sense**, this is everything else you need to build a complete BugBot.

You will also need to [3D print the chassis parts](3d-printing.md) — no other fabrication is required, and no soldering.

---

## Electronics

!!! note "Links coming soon"
    Purchase links will be added here. Quantities and part numbers are listed so you can search in the meantime.

| Part | Qty | Notes |
|---|:---:|---|
| Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32-C3 | 1 | The wireless dongle — plugs into your PC over USB |
| BugBot PCB | 1 | Custom carrier board — available separately |
| DC geared motors (TBD) | 4 | |
| Motor driver board (TBD) | 1 | TB6612FNG-based |
| LiPo battery (TBD mAh, TBD S) | 1 | |
| Battery connector / cable | 1 | |
| VL53L5CX breakout (if not on PCB) | 1 | ST 8×8 ToF ToF |

---

| Part | Qty | Notes |
|---|:---:|---|
| M? × ?mm screws (TBD) | ? | Chassis assembly |

!!! note "Sizes coming soon"
    Exact screw sizes and lengths will be confirmed once the chassis design is finalised.

---

## Tools you will need

- Small Phillips screwdriver
- Computer with Python 3.9+ for firmware setup

---
